description: Integrate SSO via SAML 2.0 and OIDC to support enterprise onboarding. This integration must work with Okta, Azure AD, and OneLogin, supporting both IdP-initiated and SP-initiated flows with JIT provisioning.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an enterprise user WHEN they attempt to log in THEN they can authenticate using SSO via SAML 2.0 or OIDC.

description: Remediate the current data isolation model to ensure compliance with SOC 2 Type II by implementing schema or database-level separation instead of application-level row filtering.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a security audit WHEN evaluating data isolation THEN it must show schema-level separation for each tenant.

description: Perform a comprehensive security audit to identify vulnerabilities and ensure compliance with industry standards.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a security audit schedule WHEN an audit is conducted THEN all vulnerabilities must be documented and addressed.

description: Develop a fine-grained role-based access control system that allows for custom role definitions, permission inheritance, resource-level access controls, and audit logging of permission changes.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an admin user WHEN they create a new role THEN they can define custom permissions and set inheritance rules.

description: Establish data residency controls that allow enterprise customers to choose where their data is stored, ensuring compliance with GDPR and data sovereignty requirements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a customer account WHEN they select a data region THEN their data must be stored in the specified region with no cross-region replication.

description: Implement monitoring and alerting for platform uptime to ensure high availability and customer satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a monitoring system WHEN uptime drops below 99.9% THEN an alert is triggered to the operations team.

description: Create an audit logging system that tracks all changes to permissions and roles within the platform to ensure accountability and compliance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a role change occurs WHEN the change is made THEN it must be logged with user details and timestamp.

description: Assess current data storage practices to ensure compliance with data residency regulations, particularly for EU and APAC regions.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a compliance review is conducted WHEN data storage practices are evaluated THEN they must meet GDPR and data sovereignty requirements.

description: Implement a mechanism to collect user feedback on the platform's features and usability to guide future enhancements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user account WHEN they access the feedback form THEN they can submit their feedback on platform features.

description: Implement a systematic approach to collect customer satisfaction scores for enterprise tenants to understand user experience and improve retention.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a customer account WHEN they complete a satisfaction survey THEN their feedback is recorded and analyzed.

description: Develop white-label branding options that allow enterprise customers to customize the platform with their own logos, color schemes, and domain names.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a customer account WHEN they configure branding settings THEN they can upload logos and select color schemes.
dependencies: story-rbac-enhancement, story-audit-logging-permissions, story-data-residency-controls, story-compliance-data-residency, story-uptime-monitoring, story-user-feedback-collection, story-customer-satisfaction-survey

description: Conduct A/B testing on the onboarding process for enterprise tenants to identify methods that lead to faster onboarding times and higher satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN two onboarding processes WHEN new users complete onboarding THEN measure time taken and satisfaction scores.
dependencies: story-rbac-enhancement, story-audit-logging-permissions, story-data-residency-controls, story-compliance-data-residency, story-uptime-monitoring, story-user-feedback-collection, story-customer-satisfaction-survey
